LESSON PLAN
Subject: Chemistry | Class: JSS3 | Board: NERDC

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to define the key concepts in Chemistry as specified by the NERDC curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must define the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per NERDC continuous assessment guidelines.
reference:

Activity: Guided class exercise with Nigerian context examples.
Assessment: Short quiz to check understanding.
